   "source": [
    "# カップリング解析: チャンネル間伝達経路の推定\n",
    "\n",
    "[![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/tatsuki-washimi/gwexpy/blob/main/docs/web/en/user_guide/tutorials/case_coupling_analysis.ipynb)\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cecfafc2",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.001837,
     "end_time": "2026-04-29T13:21:43.379457+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-29T13:21:43.377620+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "このケーススタディは legacy の PEM injection notebook を公開 docs 用に整理したものです。出力は **結合関数** で、witness チャンネルの雑音が target にどう投影されるかを周波数ごとに推定します。\n",
    "\n",
    "ただし、この推定は伝達経路のモデルであって、物理機構そのものを証明するものではありません。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "de08d431",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-29T13:21:43.405625Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-29T13:21:43.405332Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-29T13:21:56.156305Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-29T13:21:56.155476Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 12.772357,
     "end_time": "2026-04-29T13:21:56.156986+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-29T13:21:43.384629+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "from astropy import units as u\n",
    "\n",
    "from gwexpy.analysis import PercentileThreshold, SigmaThreshold, estimate_coupling\n",
    "from gwexpy.noise.asd import from_pygwinc\n",
    "from gwexpy.noise.wave import from_asd\n",
    "from gwexpy.timeseries import TimeSeries, TimeSeriesDict\n",
    "\n",
    "fs = 2048\n",
    "duration = 32\n",
    "t = np.linspace(0, duration, duration * fs, endpoint=False)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Build background and injection states so the injected witness excess can be distinguished from the nominal detector background.\n",
    "asd_target = from_pygwinc(\"aLIGO\", fmin=3.0, fmax=fs / 2, df=1.0 / duration, quantity=\"strain\")\n",
    "asd_target.name = \"L0:CAL-DARM_STRAIN\"\n",
    "wit_name = \"L0:PEM-VOLT_GND\"\n",
    "wit_bkg = TimeSeries(np.random.normal(0, 1.0, len(t)), t0=0, sample_rate=fs, unit=u.V, name=wit_name)\n",
    "wit_inj = TimeSeries(np.random.normal(0, 1.0, len(t)), t0=duration, sample_rate=fs, unit=u.V, name=wit_name)\n",
    "wit_inj += TimeSeries(np.random.normal(0, 20, len(t)), t0=duration, sample_rate=fs, unit=u.V, name=wit_name).bandpass(20, 600)\n",
    "\n",
    "cf_true = 2e-23 * asd_target.unit * u.Hz**0.5 / wit_bkg.unit\n",
    "data_bkg = TimeSeriesDict({asd_target.name: from_asd(asd_target, duration, fs, t0=0).highpass(6).notch(8) + cf_true * wit_bkg, wit_bkg.name: wit_bkg})\n",
    "data_inj = TimeSeriesDict({asd_target.name: from_asd(asd_target, duration, fs, t0=duration).highpass(6).notch(8) + cf_true * wit_inj, wit_inj.name: wit_inj})\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "ff9fd715",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.006804,
     "end_time": "2026-04-29T13:21:56.190282+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-29T13:21:56.183478+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 1. 結合関数を推定する\n",
    "\n",
    "結合関数は target の excess と witness の excess を比で見ています。target 側に有意な excess が出なければ、推定値ではなく upper limit を返す帯域もあります。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "9c51d281",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-29T13:21:56.214535Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-29T13:21:56.213901Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-29T13:21:58.014772Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-29T13:21:58.008451Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 1.81402,
     "end_time": "2026-04-29T13:21:58.015533+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-29T13:21:56.201513+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Plot size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "result = estimate_coupling(data_inj, data_bkg, fftlength=2.0, witness=wit_name)\n",
    "\n",
    "result.plot_cf()\n",
    "plt.axhline(cf_true.value, color=\"red\", linestyle=\"--\", alpha=0.8, label=f\"True CF ({cf_true:.2e})\")\n",
    "plt.ylim(5e-24, 5e-22)\n",
    "plt.xlim(10, 1020)\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "570e6cd5",
   "metadata": {
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.018189,
     "end_time": "2026-04-29T13:21:58.065235+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-29T13:21:58.047046+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": [
     "lang-ja"
    ]
   },
   "source": [
    "## 2. しきい値戦略を変えて比べる\n",
    "\n",
    "しきい値の選び方を変えると、どこまで保守的に coupling を見積もるかが変わります。注入線が弱い帯域ほど、その違いが効きます。"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "9947cfb8",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-04-29T13:21:58.093273Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-04-29T13:21:58.093019Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-04-29T13:22:00.633672Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-04-29T13:22:00.628815Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 2.560858,
     "end_time": "2026-04-29T13:22:00.635674+00:00",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-04-29T13:21:58.074816+00:00",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [

     "data": {

       "<Plot size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"

    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",

       "<Plot size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "strategy_sigma = SigmaThreshold(sigma=5.0)\n",
    "strategy_pct = PercentileThreshold(percentile=95, factor=2.0)\n",
    "\n",
    "result_sigma = estimate_coupling(data_inj, data_bkg, fftlength=1.0, threshold_witness=strategy_sigma)\n",
    "result_pct = estimate_coupling(data_inj, data_bkg, fftlength=1.0, threshold_witness=strategy_pct)\n",
    "\n",
    "result_sigma.plot_cf(label=\"SigmaThreshold\")\n",
    "result_pct.plot_cf(label=\"PercentileThreshold\")\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.show()\n"
   ]
  }
 ],
